name: cc-enslaver
description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.18.1 hotfix: replaces the catastrophic-backtracking regex in read_guard's bare try/except/pass detector with an O(N) linear scanner; pre-fix this regex hung PreToolUse(Edit|Write) for 10 minutes to hours on healthy .py files containing try: blocks. v0.18 adds opt-in auto-GC on SessionStart via CC_ENSLAVER_AUTO_GC_DAYS=N.
